description: Signature, expiration, and binding all verify correctly, but sub/scope.target identify a different service than the one the Requester intended to call (substitution attack); MUST be rejected by Requester subject-binding check (§15.4)
note: This vector specifically tests Section 15.4 (subject binding). The Posture Assertion is cryptographically valid for service A. The Requester is actually calling service B. A conforming verifier with subject binding enabled MUST NOT accept this mark.

expected.note: SUBJECT_MISMATCH is a proposed reason code for the Section 15.4 check. If the implementation returns a generic policy deny, that is acceptable for v0.1 conformance but less informative. We recommend adding SUBJECT_MISMATCH to the reason code registry (Section 16.2).
